data.four_set_effect: Using an Elemental Burst increases all party members' ATK by 20% for 12s. This effect cannot stack.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A masquerade mask worn by the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Its hollow eyes are fixated on the golden days of the past.
circlet_of_logos.title: Royal Masque

flower_of_life.desc: A satin flower with a glossy finish, fit for an elegant gathering. It still looks as distinguished as it did on the day it was cast aside.
flower_of_life.title: Royal Flora

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: An ornamental urn that once belonged to the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Mournful winds seem to echo within its empty interior.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Royal Silver Urn

plume_of_death.desc: A feathered hat accessory worn by the old aristocrats of Mondstadt on hunts. It still stands proudly as if no time has passed.
plume_of_death.title: Royal Plume

sands_of_eon.desc: A pocket watch that once belonged to the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Passed down from generation to generation, it has witnessed many years of history.
sands_of_eon.title: Royal Pocket Watch

list.desc: A blue lily made of silky satin</br>that once served as a noblewoman's headdress.</br>A noble who once ruled over Mondstadt left it behind.</br>In that legendary age, the nobles were examples for the people.</br>They guided their subjects with their conduct and wisdom.</br>They were the true representation of the people of Mondstadt.</br>They were noble not only in lineage,</br>but also in their commitment to virtues and principles.</br>The longevity of the nobles was cut short by their endless self-indulgence.</br>Ostentation gave way to devolution.</br>
list.title: Royal Flora

list.desc: A silver mask inlaid with gold and gems and engraved with delicate patterns.</br>Delicately made, it showcases the elegance and customs of the old nobles.</br>The first nobles who rose up to rule Mondstadt began as heroes of humble origins.</br>These great chieftains and elegant princes as well as beautiful princesses and noblemen</br>once welcomed the people to their banquets and feasts.</br>In those days long past, the nobles shared their wisdom and elegance generously.</br>In that golden age, the nobles shared with the people their knowledge and profits.</br>But the later nobles were seduced by power. Their banquets were exclusively for their own pleasure.</br>
list.title: Royal Masque

list.desc: An ornamental urn made of sapphire, bearing the silver insignia of a noble house.</br>It is exquisite and elegant, a testament to the aesthetics of the ancient nobles of Mondstadt.</br>A noble who once ruled over Mondstadt left it behind.</br>However, the extravagant treasures that once lay inside are now gone.</br>These luxuries were symbols of the noble's stature,</br>as well as the confidence, pride, and prosperity of the people of Mondstadt.</br>Then, the nobles fell prey to power.</br>They took and they spent without regard for the people.</br>Luxurious accessories became vanity items.</br>
list.title: Royal Silver Urn

list.desc: The feather of a falcon proudly perched on top of an old noble's hat.</br>Hunting with the common folk and sharing the spoils with them was an old tradition.</br>Commonplace were the hunts, a hobby of the ruling class of Mondstadt.</br>The festivities were shared with their servants and the common folk,</br>As a sign of the benevolence of the nobles.</br>All the people were eager participants in the festivities.</br>Hunts soon lost their meaning.</br>The nobles took everything as their own, presuming it their right.</br>Proudly the feather still stood, yet faded was its color in the people's eyes.</br>
list.title: Royal Plume

list.desc: An exquisite pocket watch made of sapphire.</br>It remains functional even after all these years.</br>The pocket watch of a noble who once ruled over Mondstadt. The time it tells is still accurate.</br>Punctuality is a virtue, and this pocket watch helped the nobles stay on a virtuous path.</br>It was more for self-discipline than a tool to influence the common folk.</br>At daybreak, a worthy noble must be more vigilant than his people.</br>At night, he should be more thoughtful and restless than they.</br>Over the years, the once-strict schedule was overturned by their indolent descendants.</br>Their timepieces grew more extravagant, but lost their virtuous function.</br>
list.title: Royal Pocket Watch
